description: Tristan from Zeta presents a demo of the Zeta platform, a DeFi derivatives platform offering futures and options trading. He discusses the integration of wallets, onboarding flow, and the trading interface, highlighting the ability to trade options on Solana with a current price of $244. The demo includes selecting and selling call options, showcasing the platform's under-collateralized model, allowing users to trade with lower initial margins [t=8:72-334:87].
topic_summary: Demo of Zeta platform for trading options and futures on Solana, emphasizing user experience and under-collateralized trading.
